name: Yamada Servicer Synthetic Office Co.,Ltd
summary: Yamada Servicer Synthetic Office Co.,Ltd operates as a servicer company in Japan. The company engages in the management and collection of debt; debt transaction; collection consignment; and non-performing loan disposal businesses, as well as provides personal revitalization support services. It also offers paid job placement; consultation for business revitalization; real estate consulting services; and land survey services. The company was formerly known as Yamada Sokuryo Sekkei Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yamada Servicer Synthetic Office Co., Ltd in June 1999. Yamada Servicer Synthetic Office Co.,Ltd was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
